sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse_index: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal mapper used to load DIT FFT input samples in bit-reversed order.
sub_modules.fft16_index_calc: Combinational iterative radix-2 DIT address generator for butterfly pair indices and twiddle ROM index.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for N=16 using the specified cosine and sine encoding.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with FFT/IFFT twiddle sign selection and Q1.15 rounded twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.fft16_output_normalize: Combinational output scaling block: FFT passthrough, IFFT arithmetic divide-by-16 normalization.
